name: Hatch
description: Pen-and-ink crosshatching warming up a blank page — stroke clusters tilt and cross at new angles on every redraw.

code.style: --ang1: @rand(360deg); --ang2: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( /* each pass is one stroke plus two shadow copies, so the set stays parallel */ --pen: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --hg: calc(@r(80, 120) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 18%; top: 38%; width: @rand(44%, 64%); height: calc(7px / @Y); background: @var(--pen); opacity: 0.85; transform: rotate(var(--ang1)); box-shadow: 0 @var(--hg) @var(--pen), 0 calc(@var(--hg) * -1) @var(--pen); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.45) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 24%; top: 50%; width: @rand(38%, 58%); height: calc(7px / @Y); background: var(--color1); opacity: 0.6; transform: rotate(var(--ang2)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
